triage_rows.direction: use the shadow control packet to inspect accepted post-rotation control state without touching the current primary packet
keep the primary control packet unchanged until the accepted rotation is deliberately promoted
review shadow control impact before deciding whether top-level consumers should adopt the accepted rotation

interpretation: The accepted rotation is now visible not only as a snapshot but also as a control-packet-level shadow state.
This preserves promotion discipline while exposing the likely top-level control outcome.
